passives.desc: Encounter Start: Gain Shield equal to 20% of max HP (remains throughout this Encounter) Turn Start: - Gain [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] based on [UnlockBuff_Base] stage on self - Inflict [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] to a random enemy and prioritize attacking that enemy (excluding certain pattern) Deal +2.5% damage to [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] for every [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (max 20%) - At 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], deal +30% damage to all targets instead
passives.name: Prescript Delivered on a Device

passives.desc: Turn End: If [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was executed this turn, heal 15 SP and gain [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] by ([UnlockBuff_Base] stage + 1) (once per turn) Turn End: If [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was not executed this turn, gain 1 [PressureOfPrescript] and 5 [KarmaOfIndexStudent] - If this unit does not have [UnlockBuff_Base], gain 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] at Turn End - At 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], does not gain [KarmaOfIndexStudent] - If this unit is under the effect of Effloresced[TabExplain] E.G.O::Procuration, double [KarmaOfIndexStudent] this unit will gain
passives.name: Will of the Prescript

passives.desc: Turn End: At 3/6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] or at 90%-/75%-/60%- HP, - Gain [UnlockBuff_1]/[UnlockBuff_2]/[UnlockBuff_3] - Heal to 45 SP - Consume all [PressureOfPrescript] and recover from Stagger - Gain 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] in the turn after [UnlockBuff_Base] was gained for the first time If [UnlockBuff_Base] was gained based on HP conditional above, - Gain [KarmaOfIndexStudent] by (sum of healed SP / 15) - Increase [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] to 3/6/9 if this unit had less than 3/6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy]; gain 1 [DefenseDown] and 2 [KarmaOfIndexStudent] next turn for every [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] Stack gained Min & Max Speed +10 in the turn this unit uses its powerful attack
passives.name: Unlock

passives.desc:
Turn Start: if this unit has [UnlockBuff_Base] and is at 25+ SP, consume 15 SP to enter Effloresced[TabExplain] E.G.O::Procuration state and recover from Stagger
- Gain [Blandishment_Enemy] and a different set of Resistance values while in this state
- Turn Start: at 0 or less SP, exit Effloresced[TabExplain] E.G.O::Procuration state
passives.name: Effloresced E.G.O::Procuration

passives.desc:
When Vespa enters the battlefield:
- If [UnlockBuff_Base] is below stage II, gain [UnlockBuff_3], heal SP to 45, and recover from Stagger
- Gain 1 [Blandishment_Shin_Enemy] and gain Shield equal to 50% of max HP (lasts for the rest of this Encounter)
- Disable the [PressureOfPrescript] cost of activating the 'Unlock[TabExplain]' Passive
- Intensify [PressureOfPrescript] to [PressureOfPrescript_2nd] and max out its Stack
- Turn Start: Gain 1 [PressureOfPrescript_2nd]
- Then, this unit's SP does not drop below 0

At 20% or less HP, max out [PressureOfPrescript_2nd] Stack
passives.name: Annihilation Form

passives.desc: Turn End: if in Panic, reset SP to 0.
passives.name: Panic Recovery

passives.desc: This unit's Panic Type does not change when inflicted with an effect that changes Panic Types. Instead, this unit is inflicted with an effect that is inflicted against Non-SP Units.
passives.name: Fixed Panic
